channel.title: Projects on samridh3215
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on samridh3215

item.title: Early Speed Breaker Detection
item.description: Aims to reduce road accidents caused by speed breakers and potholes, by alerting the driver in advance about an incoming speed breaker and in the process also create a database of all existing speed breakers

item.title: Pay via Fingerprint
item.description: This project was done as a part of the course Microprocessors and computer architecture (UE21CS251B). It aims to facilitate payments in campus via sudent’s fingerpints

item.title: Vulnerability Detection and Remidiation in Source Code
item.description: This project aims to perform static code analysis on source code to detect presence of vulnerability and provide fix for it by making use of multilpe LLMs

item.title: GOSniff
item.description: A simple packet sniffer written in GO

item.title: Mock Stock App
item.description: An attempt to create a simulation of stock market

item.title: Online Portal for University Student
item.description: This project focused more on getting hands on experience with processes that take place while developing a software

item.title: Food Supply Chain
item.description: Blockchain project targetting the food industry supply chain, making it easier and more transparent by decentralising the process
